hooks.command: echo 'Reminder: All code must pass mypy strict, ruff, and bandit. Use Google-style docstrings. Design: OOP for stateful entities, functional for data transforms, async only for I/O-bound work, multiprocessing for CPU-bound. Apply patterns only when they solve real complexity. Security: no eval/exec on untrusted input, no hardcoded secrets, no pickle on untrusted data, no yaml.load without SafeLoader, no SQL string concatenation.'

filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$filepath" == *.py ]]; then uv run ruff check --fix "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; uv run ruff format "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; uv run bandit -q "$filepath" -c pyproject.toml 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0
